metadata.name: kronos
metadata.description: Kronos luxury watch perpetual futures protocol

instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Accept a pending admin transfer (two-step).

instructions.name: add_margin
docs: Add margin from free collateral to an open position.

instructions.name: admin_close_position
docs: Admin: force-close any position (for oracle pricing corrections).

instructions.name: cancel_timelock
docs: Admin: cancel all pending timelocked actions.

instructions.name: check_and_pause
docs: Permissionless: pause the protocol if oracle is stale beyond threshold.

accounts.name: market_state
docs: Proves the oracle belongs to a real market (Anchor owner+discriminator check)

instructions.name: claim_fees
docs: LP: claim accumulated trading fees.

instructions.name: claim_referral
docs: Claim accumulated referral fees.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's USDC token account to receive fees

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault holds the USDC (referral fees stay in fee_vault until claimed)

instructions.name: close_margin_account
docs: Close (delete) a margin account and return rent to the user.

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close a position by slot index and settle PnL.

instructions.name: deposit_collateral
docs: Deposit USDC collateral into the protocol.

instructions.name: execute_params
docs: Permissionless: execute a pending param change after timelock expires.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can execute after timelock expires

instructions.name: execute_sl_tp
docs: Execute a stop-loss or take-profit on any position (permissionless, keeper receives 0.1% reward).

instructions.name: init_market_oracle
docs: Admin: initialize a market-specific oracle account.

instructions.name: init_market_state
docs: Admin: initialize a per-market state account (tracks OI per market).

instructions.name: init_payout_queue
docs: Admin: initialize the payout queue (one-time).

instructions.name: init_timelock
docs: Admin: initialize the timelock (one-time).

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-time setup. Creates all protocol accounts and sets default parameters.

instructions.name: initialize_pool
docs: One-time setup for the liquidity pool (admin only, run after initialize).

instructions.name: liquidate
docs: Liquidate an undercollateralised position by slot index (anyone can call).

instructions.name: lp_deposit
docs: LP: deposit USDC into the liquidity pool, receive shares.

instructions.name: lp_withdraw
docs: LP: withdraw USDC from the liquidity pool by burning shares.

instructions.name: migrate_referral
docs: Migrate a referral account to the new larger size (permissionless).

instructions.name: mint_devnet_usdc
docs: Devnet helper: mint 1000 USDC to the caller (no auth required).
Disabled on mainnet builds.

instructions.name: open_position
docs: Open a perpetual position with optional SL/TP.

instructions.name: process_payouts
docs: Permissionless: process the next pending payout from the queue.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: The user's USDC token account — must match the head of the queue.

instructions.name: propose_params
docs: Admin: propose a timelocked parameter change (24h delay).

instructions.name: propose_withdrawal
docs: Admin: propose a timelocked withdrawal (24h delay). vault_type: 0=fees, 1=insurance.

instructions.name: realloc_protocol
docs: One-time: grow ProtocolState for new fields.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: because the on-chain data is too small for the new struct.

instructions.name: record_raffle
docs: Admin: record a raffle winner on-chain (drawn off-chain using slot hash).

instructions.name: register_referral
docs: Register a referral account with a username.

instructions.name: remove_margin
docs: Remove margin from an open position back to free collateral (health-checked).

instructions.name: set_fee_share
docs: Admin: set fee share bps for a referral account (0-3000 = 0-30%).

instructions.name: set_sl_tp
docs: Set stop-loss and/or take-profit on an open position.

instructions.name: settle_funding
docs: Settle accrued funding on all positions in a margin account (permissionless crank).

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone can crank this (keeper, user, etc.)

instructions.name: update_market_oracle
docs: Admin: push a price to a market-specific oracle.

instructions.name: update_oracle
docs: Admin: push a new oracle price (default market).

instructions.name: update_params
docs: Admin: update protocol parameters (direct, no timelock — kept for pause/unpause emergencies).

instructions.name: withdraw_collateral
docs: Withdraw free (unencumbered) collateral.

instructions.name: withdraw_fees
docs: Admin: withdraw USDC from the fee vault.

instructions.name: withdraw_insurance
docs: Admin: withdraw USDC from the insurance fund.

errors.name: NoOpenPosition
errors.msg: No open position in that slot

errors.name: ExceedsMaxExposure
errors.msg: Trade would exceed max exposure limit

errors.name: OracleNotStale
errors.msg: Oracle is not stale — cannot pause

errors.name: InvalidStopLoss
errors.msg: Invalid stop-loss price for position direction

errors.name: InvalidTakeProfit
errors.msg: Invalid take-profit price for position direction

errors.name: MarketOracleMismatch
errors.msg: Market state oracle does not match the provided oracle account

errors.name: OraclePriceDeviation
errors.msg: Oracle price change exceeds maximum deviation

errors.name: MinFirstDeposit
errors.msg: First LP deposit must be at least 10 USDC

errors.name: InvalidParam
errors.msg: Parameter value out of allowed range

fields.name: acc_fee_per_share
docs: MasterChef-style accumulator: total fees per share (scaled by 1e12).
Monotonically increasing. Used for fair fee distribution across LPs.

fields.name: reward_debt
docs: MasterChef reward_debt = shares * acc_fee_per_share at last deposit/withdraw.

fields.name: total_user_collateral
docs: Running total of user-owned USDC in fee_vault (collateral + position collateral).
withdraw_fees cannot withdraw below this amount.

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Two-step admin transfer: pending new admin must call accept_admin to complete.

fields.name: total_referral_pending
docs: Running total of unclaimed referral fees in fee_vault.

fields.name: fee_share_bps
docs: Admin-configurable fee share in bps (0 = use default/auto, 1000-3000 = 10-30%).

fields.name: unique_referrals
docs: Number of unique traders who have used this referral code.

fields.name: total_fees_generated
docs: Total trading fees generated by referred trades (raw USDC, 6 decimals).

fields.name: pending_params
docs: Pending parameter change

fields.name: pending_fee_withdrawal
docs: Pending fee vault withdrawal

fields.name: pending_insurance_withdrawal
docs: Pending insurance withdrawal
